objective: Upgrade harness planning from lightweight templates into strict, research-backed planning and task quality gates.

acceptance_criteria.text:
Plan template requires research-backed planning sections
Task template requires atomic XS/S task fields
Plan/task validators reject incomplete or oversized artifacts
Prompt packets and docs describe the new workflow
Unittest discovery and compileall pass

non_goals: No external dependencies\nNo command interface renames\nNo changes to authoritative top-level state fields beyond optional planning quality evidence

always: edit harness scripts, docs, and tests. Ask first: destructive git operations, external services, dependency additions. Never: commit secrets or fabricate evidence.

objective.value: Upgrade harness planning from lightweight templates into strict, research-backed planning and task quality gates.

audience.value: Codex agents and human operators using harness-development to plan implementation work.

desired_outcome.value: Plan and task artifacts become detailed, enforceable, implementation-ready, and blocked by strict quality validation before downstream phases.

success_criteria.value:
Plan template requires research-backed planning sections
Task template requires atomic XS/S task fields
Plan/task validators reject incomplete or oversized artifacts
Prompt packets and docs describe the new workflow
Unittest discovery and compileall pass

non_goals.value: No external dependencies\nNo command interface renames\nNo changes to authoritative top-level state fields beyond optional planning quality evidence

constraints.value: Use Python standard library only; keep existing CLI commands stable; preserve backwards-compatible state.

permissions.value: Always: edit harness scripts, docs, and tests. Ask first: destructive git operations, external services, dependency additions. Never: commit secrets or fabricate evidence.

verification_expectations.value: Run python3 -m unittest discover tests and python3 -m compileall scripts.

next_action: Record verification evidence and prepare closeout.
